name: combination-dial
title: Combination Dial
author: Parable
description: A rotary combination-lock control: accessible role="spinbutton" dials rotated by pointer drag or arrow keys, each with aria-valuetext and SVG notch ticks; when every dial matches the combination it fires onUnlock and animates a latch-open reveal. Controlled or uncontrolled, SSR-deterministic. Dials snap without tweening under prefers-reduced-motion.
